deviations.name: Double Demolishers
deviations.desc: Two Necramech Demolishers will attack any conduit, but their health is reduced.

risks.name: Entanglement
risks.desc: Allies within 4m of slain enemies endure reduced Movement Speed and Parkour Velocity.

risks.name: Postmortal Surges
risks.desc: Slain enemies burst with Void energy.

risks.name: Commanding Culverins
risks.desc: Rogue Culverins equip weapons that deal 5x Damage to Overguard and Necramechs.

deviations.name: Glyph Inflation
deviations.desc: The security system requires twice as many Vosphene Glyphs to activate.

risks.name: Fortified Foes
risks.desc: Guardian Eximus units may be encountered, including Guardian Eximus Necramechs.

risks.name: Vampyric Liminus
risks.desc: Slow moving, immortal, Duviri Liminus drain health and energy from allies who get too close.

deviations.name: Noise Suppression
deviations.desc: Drones fly above Flare, spraying them with Efervon gas.

risks.name: Bold Venture
risks.desc: Enemies deal -15% Damage and take +15% Damage but gain +15% Movement Speed, Attack Speed, and Fire Rate.

risks.name: Devil's Bargain
risks.desc: Allies within 4m of slain enemies gain +25% Fire Rate at the cost of -50% Ammo Efficiency.

deviations.name: Growth Hormones
deviations.desc: Legacytes are more powerful with each generation but take longer to escape.

risks.name: Heavy Warfare
risks.desc: Enemies take x1.25 damage from Heavy Weapons and Thermian RPGs, 95% less from other sources. Enemies will drop heavy ammo packs and heavy weapon recall time reduced to 5s.

risks.name: Artillery Beacons
risks.desc: When killed, Scaldra troops drop artillery beacons that summon bombardments.

deviations.name: Cache Crash
deviations.desc: Consequences of opening a Supply Cache are active from the start and will intensify once it is opened. Failure to open a Supply Cache doubles the kill count required to finish the mission.

risks.name: Postmortal Surges
risks.desc: Slain enemies burst with Void energy.

risks.name: Beyond The Wall
risks.desc: Murmur enemies join ranks with Scaldra and the Techrot.

events.name: Psionic Feedback
events.desc: 10% chance to set off a 250 damage, 5m radius blast of Radiation.

events.name: Punchcard
events.desc: Add +1.5m punch through to primary weapons.

events.name: Emergency Medicine
events.desc: All restoration effects provided by Orb pickups increased by 25%.

events.name: More the Merrier
events.desc: Non-Tenno Allies within 20m all gain +5% Melee Attack Speed and +20% Fire Rate for each one in range.

events.name: Targeted Medicine
events.desc: Shoot Health Orbs to pick them up. Health orbs now have 25% chance to duplicate when picked up.

events.name: Combo Killer
events.desc: Combo Multiplier increases the chance of enemies being susceptible to finishers after a melee hit. 5% per Multiplier Max 65% with Venka Prime.

events.name: Bottled Lightning
events.desc: Add 25% Status Damage and Electricity Status Chance to all weapons.

jobs.challenge: Destroy 2 Void Angels, keep Exodampers intact
Awaken a dormant Void Angel and defeat it
Defeat the Mocking or Scathing Whisper
